hero.title: Join the #1 network that works for you

howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: A simple 3-step process to connect tradespeople and clients
howItWorks.step1Desc: Describe your project in just a few minutes. Our team validates and qualifies your request.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Our advisors analyze your project and forward it to the most qualified tradespeople.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Receive quotes and select the professional that best fits your needs.

testimonials.title: They Trust Us

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about our network
faq.q1: How do I join the network?
faq.a1: Simply fill in the registration form on the Become a Pro page. Our team will contact you within 24 hours to finalize your membership.
faq.a2: Yes, every submitted project is validated by our team before being sent to tradespeople. This guarantees the quality and seriousness of requests.
faq.a3: We offer several plans tailored to your needs: per job, subscription, or lead packs. Check our Plans page for full details.
faq.a4: Our platform uses a secure payment system that protects both tradespeople and clients throughout the project.
faq.q5: Can I choose my service area?
faq.a5: Yes, you set your geographic area during registration. You will only receive projects in your sector.

packs.title: Our Plans
packs.subtitle: Formulas adapted to every professional
packs.artisanSubtitle: Annual membership. Pay once a year, access your tradesperson dashboard and receive qualified projects.
packs.horizon_desc: Perfect to get started. One-time payment, lifetime access to client portal and qualified projects in your area.
packs.silver_desc: For professionals who want better visibility and priority on projects in their area.
packs.premium_desc: For professionals who want exclusive projects with no competition and the best return on investment.
packs.perProjectSubtitle: No subscription. Pay only for the projects that interest you.
packs.leadsSubtitle: Qualified leads delivered directly to your client portal, no subscription required.
packs.leadsNote: All our leads are qualified a maximum of 24h before being delivered to your client portal.
packs.clientDesc: You pay nothing. We connect you with the best tradespeople in your area, verify their qualifications and support you through to the end of your project. Receive 3 comparative quotes within 48h.

contact.why2Desc: Receive up to 3 comparative quotes quickly.
